title: Microservices: Saga Pattern
input_format: Ordered sequence of saga steps with execute and compensate functions
output_format: Saga execution result with status and compensation log if failed
example_input: saga.addStep({ name: 'reserve-inventory', execute: reserveInventory, compensate: releaseInventory }); saga.addStep({ name: 'charge-payment', execute: chargePayment, compensate: refundPayment }); saga.execute(orderData);
constraints: Must execute steps in order. Must compensate in reverse order on failure. Must handle compensation failures. Must support both orchestration and choreography patterns. Must be idempotent.
function_signature: class SagaOrchestrator { addStep(step: SagaStep): void; execute(context: any): Promise<SagaResult>; getStatus(sagaId: string): SagaStatus; }
